title: papaver persicum subsp. tauricola
intro: Papaver persicum subsp. tauricola, also known as the Turkish poppy, is a species of flowering plant within the poppy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in its alkaloids such as meconidine, which have analgesic and sedative effects. The health benefits of Papaver persicum subsp. tauricola include relief from pain and anxiety, as well as potential benefits for sleep disorders. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to potential side effects and interactions with medications.
